description: Designed headline card on a pale cream background, formatted like a news-article or press-release header. The large black sans-serif headline reads: 'U.S. Launches "Project Firewall" to Step Up H-1B Visa Enforcement'. Below it is a short coral horizontal divider rule, then a smaller black sub-headline: 'New Department of Labor initiative will tighten oversight of the H-1B program and increase investigations into employers'. There are no photos, seals, or other imagery in the frame; the design is text only.
notable_text: U.S. Launches "Project Firewall" to Step Up H-1B Visa Enforcement; New Department of Labor initiative will tighten oversight of the H-1B program and increase investigations into employers
